title: eve book
wikitext:
[]: eve book             Quote Post by misatolover45 » Tue Jul 18, 2006 2:05 pm does anybody know where i can find the eve book? ive been searching online and all i can find are copies in german, and since i only speak english, id like to find a copy in english, if any exist.

[]:             Quote Post by badc0de » Tue Jul 18, 2006 2:32 pm Do you mean the artbook? Is there at all text in it? Does anybody know that? I don't have it... yet. Must... resists... the... desire... XD Iterestingly I found the Japanese and the German book an amazon.co.jp Oo P.S.: 度像目案てぇあｒｔぼおｋ＿ <-- English text+German keyboard+looking at the dirty keyboard+forgot to deactivate the Japanese IME :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 18, 2006 3:25 pm There are better books to buy than the Eve photo file, or it's counter part Adam. It's just a bunch of images of the female characters taken directly from the anime. I would recommend buying another book.

[]:             Quote Post by misatolover45 » Tue Jul 18, 2006 7:26 pm any recommendations then?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jul 18, 2006 7:36 pm A few of my favorites: Die Sterne E Mono NewType 100% Collection 2015 // The Last Year of Ryohji Kaji Sore wo Nasumono Der Mond See also: http://www.evamonkey.com/writings_horn13.php http://www.evamonkey.com/merchandise_books.php

[]:             Quote Post by misatolover45 » Wed Jul 19, 2006 12:18 am thanks, i already have the newtype collection and its very good

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Jul 19, 2006 12:24 am Hey, Aaron, don't dump on Adam. It has, like, actual information in it!
